Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Pine Knob Music Theatre
Clarkston, MI
Previous Names:
Pine Knob Music Theatre (Changed after 2003)
DTE Energy Music Theatre (Changed after 2021)
Seating Capacity: 15274
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 20
  DMB  (19)
  Dave & Tim  (1)

Longest Performance:
06.27.23 - Seek Up (22:14)

Song Liberations
  8.11.21 – Spaceman (after 1069 days)
  6.21.22 – Sugar Man (after 2845 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Pine Knob Music Theatre (known as DTE Energy Music Theatre from 2004–2021) is a 15,274-seat amphitheater located in Independence Township, Michigan. It opened in 1972 with an Andy Williams concert. It is in the same complex as Pine Knob Golf Course and Ski Area, hence its original name.

33 Bob Seger Dr.
Clarkston, MI 48348

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Kill the King (6.6.06)
